governing_requirement: Execute a real single-person Mode A transaction from an adopted immutable package and active exact operational certificate through the pinned adapter into a downstream ComfyUI inpaint/edit pass, binding complete source, character, person, mask, transform, workflow, result, history and authority evidence.

dependency_state.disposition: MF-P6-12.02 remains dependency and execution blocked. Frozen transaction/qualification shapes and dependency-light Mode A fixture behavior receive limited credit; no real downstream slice has run.

verified_foundations: Frozen request/receipt validation binds Mode A package selectors, exact selected artifact identities, package lineage and operation kind.
Qualification validation requires each access mode exactly once, a successful execution result and request/receipt/certificate payload hash fields.
Production qualification evidence files are byte-verified under a supplied evidence root and check result hashes bind complete executed result objects.
Dependency-light node fixtures select distinct p0/p1 packages, serialize legacy and multi-instance workflows and avoid package mutation.
Four focused qualification/authority/package/workflow tests pass and Ruff reports no issues.
confirmed_gaps: MF-P6-11.02 does not validate an adopted immutable package, actual bytes, owner/instance/transform/revocation state or separate exact operational wrapper before Mode A use.
MF-P6-12.01 has no published clean-installed integration release or exact installed adapter/node inventory.
The generic qualification vertical-slice row permits a null Mode A certificate and cannot prove an exact active wrapper for the selected output and intended use.
No strict slice evidence record binds the complete source/character/person/package/mask/transform/workflow/result/history/authority identity chain.
No pinned Main adapter invocation or downstream ComfyUI inpaint/edit execution has produced a result/history receipt.
Fixture hashes and in-memory execution objects are not evidence that actual package, adapter, workflow and result bytes were consumed.

implementation_packet.objective: Implement producer-side orchestration/evidence for one exact single-person Mode A slice over the adopted 11.02 read decision and 12.01 integration release, while consuming the pinned Main adapter contract and preserving project authority boundaries.
implementation_packet.path_state: All five additive paths are absent and clean. They are disjoint from frozen v1 contracts, held MF-P6-11.02 paths, MF-P6-12.01 paths and preserved MF-P6-08.05 changes.
implementation_packet.cross_project_boundary: MaskFactory validates and publishes producer package/certificate/receipt evidence. Main owns adapter/controller/App execution and must return the exact downstream workflow/result/history evidence; MaskFactory cannot fabricate it.
acceptance_criteria: Consume only an adopted immutable Mode A package, exact active unrevoked operational wrapper, adopted integration release and pinned Main adapter compatibility decision.
Bind exact source, character revision/instance, person, package revision, encoded/decoded mask, transform, ontology, workflow, result, history and authority-decision hashes.
Execute one real downstream ComfyUI inpaint/edit pass and require a successful Main execution receipt whose bytes and history match the producer transaction.
Fail closed on raw status escalation, stale/revoked/out-of-scope wrapper, source/mask/transform/owner mismatch, adapter/release drift or missing result/history bytes.
No Mode A access or fixture status alone grants production authority, and no derived inpaint output inflates its parent authority.
implementation_packet.next_action: Hold until MF-P6-11.02 and MF-P6-12.01 are implemented/adopted and exact-project worker routing is qualified; Main-side execution evidence is an external dependency, not something MaskFactory may synthesize.

claim_boundary: This audit credits only frozen transaction/qualification shape and dependency-light Mode A fixture behavior. It does not validate an adopted package/certificate, publish an integration release, run a Main adapter or ComfyUI inpaint/edit pass, produce complete slice evidence, or complete MF-P6-12.02.
